description.en-US: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
description.zh-CN: 帮助用户发现并安装可复用的 agent skills。适用于用户想问“怎么做 X”、寻找现成 skill、确认是否已有某个 skill，或希望扩展能力而不是从零创建 skill 的场景。
